title: dianthus hispanicus subsp. fontqueri
intro: Dianthus hispanicus subsp. fontqueri, also known as the Font Quer's pink or Spanish pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family, native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dianthus hispanicus subsp. fontqueri include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. It can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile plant with various applications in herbal medicine.
